psi: noun. The twenty-third letter of Classical and Modern Greek and the twenty-fifth letter of Old and Ancient Greek.

said: verb. simple past and past participle of say
sail: noun. A piece of fabric attached to a boat and arranged such that it causes the wind to drive the boat along.
